# H055 Pilot Ledger — Dataset Card

## Source

NinjaTrader 8 Performance Report CSV export. Account-level realized-trade ledger covering operator's discretionary intraday trading activity 2026-05-01 → 2026-05-06 (6 trading sessions, including overnight Globex).

## Path + checksum

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Path | [data/external/h055_pilot_ledger/Performance.csv](Performance.csv) |
| SHA256 | `4c5ebf85f38f2881df12335f27f2007d930e7951c71c9339d2a2d3f9735c454a` |
| Computed | 2026-05-06 |
| Rows | 171 (one per closed position) |
| Header | `symbol,_priceFormat,_priceFormatType,_tickSize,buyFillId,sellFillId,qty,buyPrice,sellPrice,pnl,boughtTimestamp,soldTimestamp,duration` |

## Reconciliation against the source PDF (Performance.20260506.141640.pdf)

The PDF and CSV are paired NinjaTrader exports of the same account state at the same instant. Reconciled aggregate statistics (verified via [scripts/run_h055_adherence_audit.py](../../../scripts/run_h055_adherence_audit.py) interface contract):

| Metric | PDF | CSV (pandas, quote-aware parser) | Match |
|---|---|---|---|
| Trades | 171 | 171 | ✓ |
| Gross P/L | $6,157.75 | $6,157.75 | ✓ |
| Win rate | 74.85% | 74.85% (128/43) | ✓ |
| Avg W | $61.60 | $61.60 | ✓ |
| Avg L | $-40.16 | $-40.16 | ✓ |
| Largest W | $1,440.00 | $1,440.00 | ✓ |
| Largest L | $-260.00 | $-260.00 | ✓ |
| Contracts | 420 (entry + exit fills) | 210 lots × 2 sides = 420 | ✓ |

## Side classification rule

NinjaTrader CSV exports do NOT include an explicit side column. Side is determined by fill-timestamp ordering:

- `boughtTimestamp < soldTimestamp` → **long** (buy first, sell to close)
- `soldTimestamp < boughtTimestamp` → **short** (sell first, buy to cover)

Verified counts: 94 long, 77 short. Cross-check: shorts have higher win rate (77.92%) than longs (72.34%); pattern is symbol-conditional (CL 100% short; MNQ 85% long; MES mixed).

## License

NinjaTrader account-level data. Operator-owned (account holder = SKIE pseudonym = the project operator). No third-party redistribution restrictions on the operator's own trading data. Internal SKIE-Universe research use only; not intended for redistribution outside the project.

## Provenance

- Generated by NinjaTrader 8 Desktop (operator's local install)
- Export timestamp: 2026-05-06 14:16:40 (ET)
- Account: operator's funded futures trading account
- Includes: realized P/L only (closed positions); excludes: open positions, account fees, withdrawals/deposits

## Use within H055

The pilot ledger is **descriptive only** within the H055 hypothesis. Per [research/01_hypothesis_register/H055/design.md](../../../research/01_hypothesis_register/H055/design.md) §1 + §10, the pilot is OUT-OF-SAMPLE relative to the OOS test fold (which ends 2025-12-{03,19}); using the pilot for any v2 inferential metric beyond descriptive baselines and the advisory adherence audit (per design.md §7 / §10.5) constitutes data-snooping. Specifically:

- **Pilot drives**: empirical motivation (per [docs/audits/audit_trail_2026-05-06_h055_wick_reversal_design.md](../../../docs/audits/audit_trail_2026-05-06_h055_wick_reversal_design.md) summary), Component 1 trend-gate supervised target (per-day per-symbol side-skew is the Brier-score label on the calibration holdout), advisory adherence audit replay (per design.md §7).
- **Pilot does NOT drive**: parameter selection (uses calibration holdout 2015-2019), walk-forward IS fitting (uses 2020-2023), OOS test (uses 2024-2025), or any LW2008/SPA inferential decision.

## Side-by-side regime context

The pilot week saw exceptional regime asymmetry across asset classes:

- **NQ / MNQ**: breaking new all-time highs daily through the week (bullish regime) — operator manual side-skew 84% long
- **CL / MCL**: -10% intraday drawdown on 2026-05-06 (bearish regime, day-of) — operator manual side-skew 100% short on 2026-05-06

Per [research/01_hypothesis_register/H055/design.md](../../../research/01_hypothesis_register/H055/design.md) §3, this manual asymmetry is the calibration target for the Component 1 trend gate.

## Energy/metals deferral (binding scope note)

The pilot ledger contains trades on instruments NOT in the v1 universe: CL (full crude), MCL (micro crude), MGC (micro gold), MYM (micro Dow). These are excluded from H055 v1 because [data/processed/vendor_legacy_1min_roll_adjusted/](../../processed/vendor_legacy_1min_roll_adjusted/) contains only ES + NQ. Per `P1-H055-CL-MCL-MYM-MGC-INGEST-AND-EXTEND` (deferred), the v2 strategy will be evaluable on those symbols only after substrate ingest completes. The pilot trades on these instruments are retained in the CSV verbatim for reproducibility but are scoped OUT of the H055 v1 OOS evaluation.
